ADMIN.TITLE: Admin-Tools
ADMIN.WARNING_INFO:
This area is intended for repository administration only. Improper settings can lead to errors or even data loss.
Do not carry out any actions that you are unsure about!

PLUGINS.TITLE: Extensions
PLUGINS.INFO: This list shows extensions for alfresco & edu-sharing. These are functional extensions for the repository.
PLUGINS.NO_DESCRIPTION: There are no details available for this plugin

edu_sharing-community-repository-backend.TITLE: edu-sharing Core
edu_sharing-community-repository-backend.DESCRIPTION: The core module of edu-sharing. It extends the base system with edu-sharing APIs, user interfaces, and additional functionalities.

Alfresco Share Services AMP.TITLE: Alfresco Share Service
Alfresco Share Services AMP.DESCRIPTION: This Alfresco module provides the Alfresco Share user interfaces.

edu_sharing-community-repository-plugin-.TITLE: edu-sharing Elasticsearch Plugin
edu_sharing-community-repository-plugin-.DESCRIPTION: The Elasticsearch module transforms objects, including statistics and metadata, into a specialized Elasticsearch index structure, enabling efficient and highly detailed search queries.

alfresco-trashcan-cleaner project.TITLE: Trashcan Cleaner
alfresco-trashcan-cleaner project.DESCRIPTION: The Trashcan Cleaner regularly deletes old content from all users' trash bins.

edu_sharing-projects-community-repositor.TITLE: edu-sharing Customizing
edu_sharing-projects-community-repositor.DESCRIPTION: This module contains project-specific customizations if applicable.

edu_sharing-enterprise-repository-plugin.TITLE: edu-sharing Transformer Plugin
edu_sharing-enterprise-repository-plugin.DESCRIPTION: This plugin separates transformation functions (such as screenshot and full-text generation of documents via LibreOffice) from the repository server, allowing for better and more stable workload distribution.

PLUGINS.MORE: More information about how to obtain, confiure and deploy extensions can be found on the edu-sharing website

GLOBAL_CONFIG.EDIT_DISABLED: The configuration was set to read-only. No modifications can be made via this tool. The parameter {{key}} must be set to true in order to change parameters via this tool.
GLOBAL_CONFIG.INHERIT_INFO: The displayed configurations are read from top to bottom. Configuration values can be overriden by files underneath the one they're declared
GLOBAL_CONFIG.VOLATILE_WARNING: Changes for this configuration file are volatile and will be removed on next restart. No propagation in cluster. Please only use it for testing purposes.
GLOBAL_CONFIG.CLIENT_CONFIG_TITLE: Client configuration (configuration of display relevant functions)
GLOBAL_CONFIG.CLIENT_CONFIG_HINT: You can enter values here to overwrite labels, configure contexts, set up authentication methods and more. After saving, you may need to reload the entire page in your browser
GLOBAL_CONFIG.BASE_CONFIG_HINT: This file serves only as a template and must not be changed. Please enter changed values in the specific configuration
GLOBAL_CONFIG.PARSED_HINT: The JSON-Result of the currently active configuration including all applied inherit steps of the individual files
GLOBAL_CONFIG.CLUSTER_DEPLOYMENT_CONFIG_HINT: Deployment-Configuration preset for all cluster nodes
GLOBAL_CONFIG.NODE_DEPLOYMENT_CONFIG_HINT: Deployment-Configuration preset for all this node (check ip address!)
GLOBAL_CONFIG.NODE_OVERRIDE_CONFIG_HINT: Override-Configuration for this cluster node (check ip address!)
GLOBAL_CONFIG.EXTENSION_CONFIG_HINT: This file is managed via the git repository of the customer project and applies to all nodes.
GLOBAL_CONFIG.DEFAULTS_OVERRIDE_CONFIG_HINT: Values configured via helm deployment override
GLOBAL_CONFIG.WARNING: Please note that invalid values/syntax may make the system unreachable. Please check all changes carefully before you continue.
GLOBAL_CONFIG.SAVED: Configuration saved. Maybe the site needs to be reloaded
GLOBAL_CONFIG.PARSE_ERROR:
Error when taking over the Config! Check the syntax and the configuration and repeat the procedure.
The repository now has an invalid state!
Please consult the log files for more information

{{error}}
GLOBAL_CONFIG.DEPLOYMENT_CONFIG_HINT: This file has been defined by deployment and might change data differing from the template. It can only changed/updated via deployment.
GLOBAL_CONFIG.SERVER_CONFIG_HINT: You can override configuration values ​​here. These changes apply to the current server and will not be overwritten during updates. They have the highest priority. WARNING! In a cluster environment, these parameters only apply to the current cluster server!

APPLICATIONS.ADD_APPLICATION: Add new application (via URL or file)
APPLICATIONS.URL_HINT: Enter the URL for a repository or service that you want to connect to (e.g. rendering service, Moodle, MediaWiki)
APPLICATIONS.OWN_URL_HINT: Use the public URL of the repository to register the system in an LMS, for example
APPLICATIONS.CHOOSE_APP_MODE: Select the type of the remote system
APPLICATIONS.USE_FILE: Select an XML file for a remote repository that you want to add
APPLICATIONS.TITLE: Description
APPLICATIONS.REMOVE_MESSAGE:
If you continue, the application will be deleted with the following information.
Please note that this procedure cannot be undone!
APPLICATIONS.APP_XML_WARNING: Attention! Invalid values may make edu-sharing no longer accessible!

HOMEAPP.public_key: The public key. Must match the private_key and should only be updated in combination
HOMEAPP.devmode: Activate developer mode. This deactivates caches for applications and metadata, among other things. Set to false in production operation to improve performance
HOMEAPP.username: User name of the system's primary administrator account (usually its admin)
HOMEAPP.guest_password: Password of the selected user for the guest account (see also guest_username)
HOMEAPP.guest_username: Username for the guest account (must be an existing Alfresco user, see also guest_password)
HOMEAPP.trustedclient: Is the system trustworthy? Must always be true for the homeappplication
HOMEAPP.type: Type of system, must be REPOSITORY
HOMEAPP.host: Public IP address of the host
HOMEAPP.is_home_node: Does this file describe the home repository? Must always be true for the homeapplication
HOMEAPP.metadatasetsV2: Comma-separated list of possible metadata sets for home nodes. First value should always be "mds" for the default set
HOMEAPP.authenticationwebservice: Absolute URL to the authentication service endpoint
HOMEAPP.domain: The primary, public domain of the system
HOMEAPP.clientport: Optional port for client access, if not set port is used
HOMEAPP.webappname: Name of the edu-sharing webapp. Usually "edu-sharing"
HOMEAPP.wspath: Path for the Alfresco Web Services API
HOMEAPP.wshotpath: Path for the edu-sharing Web Services API
HOMEAPP.clientprotocol: Optional protocol for client access (http or https), if not set "protocol" is used
HOMEAPP.appcaption: Name of the instance. Is displayed as a label in the search, for example
HOMEAPP.contenturl: Index file of the rendering service. Should be the public address (preferably https)
HOMEAPP.contenturlBackend: Optional URL for calling the rendering service from the repository. Can contain internal IP
HOMEAPP.appid: ID of the repository. Should be unique, for example, the main domain of the system
HOMEAPP.custom_html_headers: Arbitrary data (e.g. for search engines or Google Analytics), which are integrated in the <head> area of the page
HOMEAPP.resolve_website_title: If true, the repository resolves title and metadata when creating links
HOMEAPP.url_dynamic: If true, all generated links (e.g. to previews) are always mapped to the requesting domain of the client. If false, the value is always generated based on client protocol, client port and domain
HOMEAPP.allow_origin: Comma-separated list of all Origin addresses for which CORS access is allowed. An empty value allows CORS from any requesting domain. Example: "https://example.com"
HOMEAPP.notify_fetch_limit: Maximum number of Notify objects that can be created when loading the " Shared by me" / " Shared with me" folder is retrieved. Recommended values are between 200-1000. 0 disables the limit
HOMEAPP.cookie_attributes: Flags for the session-cookie, typically "secure" so it will only be sent via https. Also same-site behaviour can be configured, e.g. "SameSite=None"
HOMEAPP.import_metadataset: Metadata set that is used for imported objects from this source

CCMAIL.mail.authtype: Authentication type on the mail server. Currently either empty (= without authentication) or "tls"
CCMAIL.mail.smtp.username: User name for authentication on the mail server
CCMAIL.mail.smtp.passwd: Password for authentication on the mail server
CCMAIL.mail.smtp.from: Displayed e-mail address of the sender. Recommended "noreply@yourdomain.com"
CCMAIL.mail.addReplyTo: If true (default), the Reply-To address of the user who triggered the event is appended

UPDATE.HINT: Don't forget to make a backup of the database and documents in the repository before making any changes here.

RENDERING.TITLE: Repository + Renderingservice Version
RENDERING.STATUS_WARN:
The version of the repository could not be retrieved (Renderingservice: {{renderservice}}).
You are probably in development mode at the moment, so the version cannot be retrieved
RENDERING.STATUS_FAIL: Version of the Repository ({{repository}}) and Renderingservice ({{renderservice}}) do not match or rendering service was not found. Content may be displayed incorrectly or not at all
RENDERING.SOLUTION: Check whether a rendering service is connected (remote systems) and whether the correct version is installed

APPID.TITLE: Name of the home repository
APPID.STATUS_OK: The system has been assigned its own identifier ({{id}}).
APPID.STATUS_WARN:
The system was not assigned an ID, it uses the default value ({{id}}).
In order for this repository to communicate with other systems without errors, a unique identifier is important. It is recommended that you use an identifier that is as unique as possible (for example, the main domain of the system)

Important: Restart your server after changing the app id.
APPID.SOLUTION: Switch to "basic configuration" and edit the "appid" field in the homeApplication.properties.xml

COMPANY_HOME.TITLE: Sharing state of the root directory
COMPANY_HOME.STATUS_OK: The main directory is currently not visible to the public and all subdirectories can be shared as desired
COMPANY_HOME.STATUS_FAIL: The root directory is publicly visible and all newly created files and folders, regardless of location, can potentially be accessed by all users
COMPANY_HOME.SOLUTION: As administrator, navigate to "Company Home" and remove the public share. Then check that all data that should be publicly available is still accessible

JOBS_RUNNING.TITLE: Running background tasks
JOBS_RUNNING.STATUS_OK: Currently no tasks are active in the background and system performance is not affected
JOBS_RUNNING.STATUS_WARN: Current {{{count}} is/are Task(s) active in the background. System performance may be negatively affected
JOBS_RUNNING.SOLUTION: Check running tasks under "Tasks", terminate any tasks that are no longer needed or try to minimize the number of current accesses

MAIL_SETUP.TITLE: Mail server configuration
MAIL_SETUP.STATUS_OK: The mail server {{{host}} is used for sending e-mails
MAIL_SETUP.STATUS_FAIL: No mail server has been registered yet
MAIL_SETUP.SOLUTION: Browse to the "global system configuration" section and add the mail configuration into the edu-sharing configuration

MAIL_REPORT.TITLE: "Report a Problem" Feature
MAIL_REPORT.STATUS_OK: The function is active, incoming requests are sent to the address {{receivers}}.
MAIL_REPORT.STATUS_FAIL: The function is active, but the configuration is invalid.
MAIL_REPORT.SOLUTION: Browse to the "global system configuration" section and add the report receiver info into the edu-sharing configuration

CORS.TITLE: CORS-Configuration
CORS.STATUS_OK:
The system has been configured to allow AJAX requests from the following domain(s):
{{{allow_origin}}.
CORS.STATUS_INFO: The list of allowed clients has been configured, but the entry "http://localhost:54361" required for the app is missing. Access via app is not possible.
CORS.STATUS_FAIL: No domains have been set so far. The system therefore allows AJAX access from any source domain.
CORS.SOLUTION:
Check which systems can send AJAX requests if necessary. Then navigate to "sources" and edit the field "allow_origin" in the homeApplication.properties.xml.
If you use the edu-sharing app, add "http://localhost:54361" as an entry

RS_XSS.TITLE: Rendering Service Configuration for Cross-Side Scripting
RS_XSS.STATUS_OK: The repository is located on a different domain ({{{repo}}) than the rendering service ({{{render}}). This prevents user-generated javascripts from accessing the API
RS_XSS.STATUS_INFO: The repository is located on a different domain ({{{repo}}) than the rendering service ({{{render}}). However, the state of the CORS configuration is invalid. Check the CORS configuration
RS_XSS.STATUS_FAIL: Repository and rendering service are on the same domain ({{{repo}}). Java scripts that are executed on the rendering service therefore have access to the API and possibly cookies.
RS_XSS.SOLUTION: Repository and rendering service should be located on different (sub-)domains for security reasons. For more information, see the documentation

TP_CHECK.INFO: Every data sensitive permission gets checked for a correct configuration. This means that this permission is not available for anyone.
TP_CHECK.AUTO_FIX: If there's no known reason, this permission should not be allowed for everyone. By clicking "Fix now", the permission will get revoked for everyone. You can later configure individual users/groups to use this permission. Admins will still have this permission.

IMPORT.EXCEL_COLLECTION: Add imported nodes to collections. If not set the columns with prefix "collection" will be ignored.
IMPORT.IMPORTS_REMOVED:
Deleted OAI items will be removed.
 Check the task list to see the status
IMPORT.EXCEL_IMPORTED: Excel file imported ({{ rows }} rows imported)

TOOLKIT.CACHE_REFRESHED:
Cache is being built.
Check the task list to see the status
TOOLKIT.UPLOAD_TEMP_DONE: File was stored on the server as {{filename}}
TOOLKIT.AUTHENTICATE_AS_USER_DETAILS: If you continue the current admin session will be closed and you will be authenticated as the coosen user. You will need to relogin as admin after you've finished your test. Do you want to continue?

BROWSER.LUCENE_EXPORT_PROPERTIES: Properties to be included in the export (1 per line)
BROWSER.LUCENE_EXPORT_PROPERTIES_HINT: Reference to properties of the parent using "parent::<property>"

LUCENE_TEMPLATE_MEMORY.HINT: Save and load the content of the fields "Lucene-Query" and "Properties to be included in the export" in named templates.
LUCENE_TEMPLATE_MEMORY.CONFIRM_UPDATE_MESSAGE: Do you want to overwrite the template with the current values?
LUCENE_TEMPLATE_MEMORY.CONFIRM_DELETE_MESSAGE: Do you want to delete the template?
LUCENE_TEMPLATE_MEMORY.CHOOSE_NAME_TEXT: Choose a name for the new template.
LUCENE_TEMPLATE_MEMORY.DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_OVERRIDE: Standard templates must not be overwritten.

LUCENE_DEFAULT_TEMPLATES.CREATED_CONTENTS_BY_PERSON: All elements created by a specific user

JOBS.JOB_CLASS: Class name of the job class:
JOBS.JOB_STARTED: The task was started. Check the task list to see the status
JOBS.NO_JOBS: No tasks have been performed yet. Tasks are created by an import process, for example
JOBS.TOAST_CANCELED: The task was canceled. However, it may take a moment for the status to be updated.
JOBS.CANCEL_MESSAGE:
Canceling a task can lead to an inconsistent data state or even data loss.
Are you really sure you want to cancel the task?
JOBS.CANCEL_FORCE_INFO: By using this option, the thread of the job will be tried to force-stop. This is not recommended cause it might lead to deadlocks. Only use if no other option is viable
JOBS.CLUSTER_NOT_SUPPORTED: Jobs are not distributed across the cluster. Please check the jobs on the primary server.

NAMES.RemoveOrphanCollectionReferencesJob: Delete all collection references with missing original item
NAMES.ConvertMultivalueToSinglevalueJob: Convert a property from multivalue to singlevalue
NAMES.BulkDeleteNodesJob: Bulk deleting of multiple nodes (e.g. large folders)
NAMES.BulkEditNodesJob: Bulk processing of a property for multiple nodes
NAMES.CheckLinkJob: Checks if the target of a link still exists and sets an appropriate status

FOLDERTEMPLATES.UPLOAD_DONE: Folder template was stored as {{filename}} on the server.
FOLDERTEMPLATES.MISSING_GROUP: At least one organisation must be selected.
FOLDERTEMPLATES.MISSING_TEMPLATE: A folder template must be selected.
FOLDERTEMPLATES.TEMPLATE_NOTAPPLIED: Folder template {{{templatename}} could not be applied to {{{groupname}}. Check the folder template for correctness.
FOLDERTEMPLATES.UPLOAD_HINT: You can upload additional folder templates and then select them.

STATISTICS.NO_DATA: No data for the selected period
STATISTICS.NODES_MEDIACENTER_INFO: The given stats are only meant for access of current data. For accessing older data prefer the provided data under "monthly/yearly".
STATISTICS.ARCHIVED_INFO: In this section you can download aggregated statistics for a previous timespan. Choose the element with the respective timespan to download it
STATISTICS.ARCHIVED_EMPTY: There are no aggregated statistics yet
STATISTICS.SLICE_INFO: This list is a preview and may only contain a slice of the actual data
STATISTICS.SLICE_INFO_DOWNLOAD: This list is a preview and may only contain a slice of the actual data. Choose the export or download function to retrieve all results

GROUP_TEMPLATE.group_organization: Access counts grouped by organisation of the user
GROUP_TEMPLATE.group_mediacenter: Access counts grouped by mediacenter of the user
GROUP_TEMPLATE.group_organization_unfold_mediacenter: Access counts grouped by organisation of the user and splitted by organisation

MEDIACENTER.ADD_MEDIACENTER_MESSAGE: Enter the ID of the Media Center. All other parameters can be configured after creation
MEDIACENTER.DELETE_MESSAGE: Do you really want to delete the media center "{{name}}"?

DATA.TITLE: Basic data
DATA.EDIT_NOT_ALLOWED: The current user is missing the editing mediacenter permission. To make further changes to the data, please contact the responsible administrator of the system

GROUPS.TITLE: Managed groups
GROUPS.REMOVED: Group "{{{name}}" is no longer assigned to the Media Center
GROUPS.ADDED: Group "{{{name}}" is now assigned to the Media Center
GROUPS.REMOVE_MESSAGE: Do you want to remove the selected group "{{name}}" from the association for the current Media Center? (The group itself is not deleted)
GROUPS.DESCRIPTION: All members of the following groups can access the media of this media centre

ORG_MC_CONNECT.TITLE: Import of the associations between media centers and organizations

FRONTPAGE.DISABLED: Frontpage mode is disabled via client.config.xml. You can enable the frontpage by setting frontpage.enabled to true.
FRONTPAGE.MODE_HINT: According to which scheme should the elements of the homepage be selected
FRONTPAGE.COLLECTION_HINT: Select the collection whose materials you want to display on the home page
FRONTPAGE.TIMESPAN_HINT: For which time range should the data be evaluated
FRONTPAGE.CONFIG_BROKEN_INFO: The current configuration seems to contain errors. Do you want to remove the current configuration and reset to default?
FRONTPAGE.TOTAL_COUNT_HINT: Total number of elements which are selected. If this value is >= of the displayed elements, the selected number of displayed elements is always randomly selected from this pool
FRONTPAGE.DISPLAY_COUNT_HINT: Number of elements to be displayed when opening the start page
FRONTPAGE.TOTAL_COUNT_OUT_OF_RANGE: The total number of elements must be >= the displayed elements
FRONTPAGE.PREVIEW_HINT:
Note: The preview shown here has the following limitations:
  • Adjustments just made must be saved first
  • All materials are displayed, regardless of the visibility of a user
  • The elements of the start page are updated depending on a cache (usually at night)

PREVIEW_ERROR.ELASTICSEARCH: The connection to Elasticsearch has failed
PREVIEW_ERROR.UNKNOWN: An unknown error occurred when retrieving the contents for the start page

FRONTPAGE.CUSTOM_QUERY_HINT: A query that is additionally displayed as "AND" condition is linked. Can be arbitrarily further nested and must conform to the Elasticsearch query language (DSL)
FRONTPAGE.CUSTOM_QUERY_CONDITION_VALUE_HINT: Value for the condition, for example TOOLPERMISSION_SHOW_EDITORIAL
FRONTPAGE.TOTAL_COUNT_LARGER_HINT: If total number of elements > number of displayed elements, the selected number of elements to be displayed is always randomly chosen from this pool.

LTI.REMOVE_MESSAGE:
Do you really want to delete the token with the url "{{url}}"?

Existing links may become unavailable due to this process.
LTI.DYNAMIC_INFO:
With the dynamic lti registration you can interconnect edu-sharing with other, lti compatible systems. Click "Generate Token" to generate a new url token.

Insert it into your lti-compatible system (e.g. moodle). The external system will be automatically connected afterwards.
LTI.MANUAL_INFO:
If your lti-compatible system does not support the dynamic registration or in case it doesn't work, you may use the manual registration below.

After choosing "Save", the given data will be used in order to prepare a connection.

CONTEXT.CREATE_INFO: Mit einem Kontext können domainspezifisch Konfigurationswerte für das Frontend (client.config.xml) inkl. Sprach-Anpassungen festgelegt werden. Diese Konfiguration bietet die Möglichkeit, Kontexte zur Laufzeit hinzuzufügen, zu bearbeiten oder zu löschen. Die Einstellungen bleiben dauerhaft erhalten und überschreiben ggf. vorhandene Informationen aus der mitgelieferten client.config.xml. Änderungen werden sofort aktiv.
CONTEXT.ACTIVE: This context is active for the current domain
CONTEXT.ERROR_PARSING: At least one configuration could not be parsed as JSON. Please check the syntax
CONTEXT.REFRESH_MESSAGE:
The current context has been modified. In order to apply these modifications, the angular application has to be re-initialized.

Should the page be reloaded?
CONTEXT.DELETE_MESSAGE: Do you really want to delete the context (Id: {{id}}, Domains: {{domain}})?

LTITOOL.MANUAL_INFO:
If your LTI-compatible tool does not support dynamic registration or if it does not work, you can use manual registration.

After clicking on "Save", a connection will be prepared with the given data.
LTITOOL.DYNAMIC_INFO:
With the help of the dynamic LTI registration, LTI tools can be easily connected to edu-sharing. 
 Determine the URL for the dynamic registration of the tool and enter it in the field "URL of the tool for dynamic registration". By clicking on "Start registration" the external tool is automatically connected to edu-sharing.
